macro_segments.title: Applying the Box Case to the Woman: Status Quo, Chazakah, and Likelihood of Change

Objectifying the Woman: The Woman as a Case Like a Box with a Dead Rodent Inside

macro_segments.title: Moving the Box Between Rooms: The Principle of Not Applying Status from One Place to Another

topical_tags.term: Ein Machzikin Tumah Mimakom L'Makom (not applying status from one place to another)
Shekol HaTumaot K'Sha'at Metzi'atan (all tumaot determined by current discovery)
Safek Tumah B'Reshut HaYachid (doubtful tumah in private domain)
Yesh Bo Da'at L'Shol (capable of being asked)
Mipkidah L'Fkidah (from last check to check)
